job_location: Makati City / Quezon City / Cebu, Philippines

evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Write tests to check data quality and integrity, and fix data problems
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Responsibilities and requirements repeatedly emphasise data quality, testing, reliability, and engineering standards with no velocity or speed-of-shipping language present.
evidence.domain_risk: This role's primary function will be in data transformation & modelling, data quality & reliability, stakeholder enablement and engineering practice.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: GHD is an engineering/infrastructure consultancy and the role serves internal BI/analytics rather than financial reporting or regulated products, so errors affect business decisions without direct regulatory or financial consequence.
evidence.collaboration_width: data scientists; data analysts; business analysts
evidence.data_team_maturity: Hands-on Microsoft Fabric across the medallion architecture (Lakehouse, Warehouse, Dataflow Gen2, notebooks)
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The medallion architecture (bronze/silver/gold) and Power BI semantic model layer are already established and named directly in responsibilities, indicating an existing, growing data function rather than a greenfield build.
evidence.jd_authorship: Design, build, and maintain data models and Power BI semantic models across the bronze, silver, and gold layers in Microsoft Fabric, using SQL (dbt) and notebooks
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The responsibilities name precise architecture layers, tools, and application context (Fabric medallion layers, dbt, notebooks) that only someone who has done this work would write.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Collaborate with data scientists, data analysts, and business analysts to understand data requirements and transform raw data into actionable insights
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The primary audience named in responsibilities is the data function itself (data scientists, analysts) consuming the semantic/modelling layer, not a specific commercial or finance stakeholder group.
evidence.autonomy_level: Design, build, and maintain data models and Power BI semantic models across the bronze, silver, and gold layers
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The role executes scoped delivery work within an already-defined medallion architecture and engineering standards rather than setting new direction for the analytics function.
evidence.ai_role: Basic AI/ML Knowledge and preparing data for machine learning
evidence.ai_role_explanation: AI/ML knowledge appears only as a vague 'Nice To Have' with no concrete AI tool or responsibility named, so no AI skill is genuinely expected of the candidate.
evidence.testing_framing: Write tests to check data quality and integrity, and fix data problems
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Testing is stated as a direct responsibility with an ownership verb (write tests, fix data problems), not merely a tool named in a skills list.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing: Data quality & testing: automated data tests, validation/expectations, and reconciliation
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: Quality and reliability language recurs throughout but stays secondary to delivery and engineering-practice framing, without dominant compliance or regulatory language, indicating moderate risk framing.
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Optimize performance to support efficient, scalable, and reliable data pipelines
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: The role optimizes and extends an existing medallion architecture (fix/scale) while also building new models and tests (some greenfield elements), so signals are mixed.
evidence.work_arrangement: Our workplace thrives on a hybrid model, combining in-office collaboration and flexibility. Join us in office, three days a week
evidence.loss_aversion: Write tests to check data quality and integrity, and fix data problems — reflects a delivery-oriented concern for pipeline/data correctness rather than compliance or stakeholder-trust risk.
